---
layout: cv
title: Spencer Hoke Resume placeholder for later!
---
# Spencer Hoke



## Currently

Student at BYUI

### Specialized in

Polars, python, SQL


### Research interests

politics, security, marketing, user retention, AI, AI ethics


## Education

current - Bachelor in Data science with AI engineering minor and Database and TESOL certificate 







<!-- A list is also available [online](http://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=LTOTl0YAAAAJ) -->




## Occupation

Full time student at BYU-I 


<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
